details: Beginning generic_op infrastructure build for row_centralize. Read spec, template files, and test examples. Single-core RM->tilize->compute->untilize->RM pattern with epsilon parameter.

Created __init__.py, row_centralize.py, row_centralize_program_descriptor.py, test_row_centralize.py, kernels/row_centralize_reader.cpp, kernels/row_centralize_compute.cpp, kernels/row_centralize_writer.cpp. Ready to run test.
All 13 tests passed: 5 shape_preserved, 3 validation, 4 accuracy (shape-only check), 1 constant_row. No Python-side errors. Stub kernels compile and generic_op executes without crashes.
